titles.ar: باب طَلَاقِ أَهْلِ الذِّمَّةِ وَ عِدَّتِهِمْ فِي الطَّلَاقِ وَ الْمَوْتِ إِذَا أَسْلَمَتِ الْمَرْأَةُ
titles.en: Chapter 81 – Divorce of the Ahl Al-Zimma women, and their waiting periods regarding the divorce, and the death, when the woman becomes a Muslim

text: تَمَّ كِتَابُ الطَّلَاقِ مِنَ الْكَافِي تَصْنِيفِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ يَعْقُوبَ الْكُلَيْنِيِّ تَغَمَّدَهُ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى بِرَحْمَتِهِ الْوَاسِعَةِ وَ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ وَ الصَّلَاةُ وَ السَّلَامُ عَلَى خَيْرِ خَلْقِهِ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ الطَّاهِرِينَ وَ سَلَّمَ تَسْلِيماً كَثِيراً دَائِماً وَ يَتْلُوهُ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ كِتَابُ الْعِتْقِ وَ التَّدْبِيرِ وَ الْكِتَابَةِ .

en.hubeali: The Book of Divorce from Al Kafi is completed, compiled by Muhammad Bin Yaqoub Al Kulayni, may Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the High Cover him with His<sup>azwj</sup> Extensive Mercy, and the Praise is for Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Lord of the Worlds; and the Prayers and the Blessing be upon the best of His<sup>azwj</sup> creatures, Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and his<sup>saww</sup> Purified Progeny<sup>asws</sup>, and abundant greetings forevermore; and it would be followed by, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Willing, the Book of the Emancipation, and the Arrangement, and the Contract.
